en: The purpose of this online webinar was to inform implementers and other interested parties about the changes and new features of the most recent release of the European Digital Credential for Learning (EDC) infrastructure, and demonstrate how the newly introduced features improve overall usability and EDC's interoperability with other existing initiatives.
